condition.description: Defines the IAM condition for granting the member access, specifying criteria such as expression, title, and description.

member.description: Specifies the identity (user, service account, or group) to which the IAM policy binding will be applied; must be in the format `user:email`, `serviceAccount:email`, or `group:email`.

role.description: Specifies the IAM role to assign to the member for the Secret Manager secret (e.g., roles/secretmanager.secretAccessor); must be a valid predefined or custom role.

secret_id.description: ID of the secret for which IAM policies will be managed. Must be a valid secret name in Secret Manager.
